creator: ksym.spam@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #3)
> Do you still have this problem? I've tried building it here on -HEAD and it
> works fine, and there are no failure logs on pkg-fallout.

Part of my original comment was cut off for some reason.

The package build fails if the GTK2 -option is enabled.

Here is the package build log:
http://koti.kapsi.fi/~isoa/pr/2014-07-13/vba-1.7.2_10.log

And here is the working dir of the failed build:
http://koti.kapsi.fi/~isoa/pr/2014-07-13/vba-1.7.2_10.txz
